events.name: US Jobs (NFP)
events.effect: Hot payrolls → hawkish Fed, ↑ yields & USD → silver DOWN. Weak jobs → silver UP.

events.name: US CPI
events.effect: Hot CPI → rate-cut hopes fade, real yields up → silver DOWN (inflation-hedge bid partly offsets).

events.name: Fed FOMC
events.effect: Dovish / cut → silver UP. Hawkish hold or hike risk → silver DOWN. Biggest IV-crush event.
